Romanization

아름 아름 가려본다

isi.lyrics:
Lyric omm.. - 봄바람 (spring breeze)

Romanization

bombaram deuneun
changgae gidae
meonameon gose inneun
haenimeul bogo

haneul haneul
kkotdeureun barame jigo
areum areum
byeoldeulgwa naranhi seoseo

barameul majayo
gamanhi anjaseo
nareunhan kkum gati
jeomulji anneun oneul

Hangeul

봄바람 드는
창가에 기대
머나먼 곳에 있는
해님을 보고

하늘 하늘
꽃들은 바람에 지고
아름 아름
별들과 나란히 서서

바람을 맞아요
가만히 앉아서
나른한 꿈 같이
저물지 않는 오늘

isi.lyrics:
Lyric DOF - Word (With PAUL)

Romanization

See you walking past me I just know it
My life is gonna change, no I'm not dreaming
It seems you're heading towards my way
I guess I'm gonna shoot all my shots

You asked me if you could sit beside me
I nodded then I moved away
It got me thinking why I'm flustered
How I wasn't able to say a single word

No word
Not a damn single word

I shook my head now in disbelief
Oh I can't believe
What happened to me

No word
Not a damn single word

Where's the courage?
That I've been bragging
I'm caught lacking
I'm struggling

Feeling quite embarrassed but I'm ok
I'm gonna try to open up a convo
Done asking how fine is the weather
I guess I'm gonna wing it for now

You started talking bout your exes
I started talking about mine to
Please this is getting really dry now
Am I just losing all my speaking skills now?

No word
Not a damn single word

I shook my head now in disbelief

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Leilah - 호접몽 (Butterfly dream)

Romanization

kkumin julman arasseo nan
gieok soge isseotdeon neon
ireon moseubieotdeon geolkka jeongmal
mot arabol ppeonhaesseo neol
wae ijeseoya neon nal
chajaon geolkka no way

You come to me like I'm dreamin'
kkum anin sesang yeogi
jigeum igoseseo nega nal bulleo "Hey"
sunggan meoritsogeun white
Time is ticking, arado
To you, mari tteooreujil anaseo

Boy you're making me fool
gidarin geolkka neol
oneureseoya arabon geolkka neol
Why you're being so cruel
doraogil gidarin geoya
neol wihan yeonghwa gateun i sungganeul

Wake up, boy take me
Wake up, in hurry
Boy you make my fantasy to life
I'll got you up and make you mine

Wake up, boy take me
Wake up, in hurry
Boy you make my fantasy to life
I'll got you up and make you mine

tteooreujil anatdeon geunal
nae meoril heongkeuryeotdeon geot gata

geu huron horyeonhi tteonan neon
nae gieok sogeul hejibeonogon

o saranghae

Hangeul

웬일로 아무 소식 없다가
사려니 숲길을 따라
홀연히 나타나서 걷는 널
두 마리 노루가 보네
그때 우리도 너를 보네
순간 너도 우리를 보네
나와 노루와 너와 우리가
링크되는 순간

사랑
사랑스러운
순간
사랑스러운

길 없는 길을 따라 걷다가
사려니 숲길을 만나
다행히 밤이 찾아오기 전
우린 길 있는 길을 따라서
걷다 뛰다 또 걷다가
노루와 너를 우연히
보게 되네 만나게 되네
서로들 서로를 보네

오 사랑해
오 사랑해
오 사랑해
오 사랑해
